title: CV Stash
subtitle: Write in Markdown. Preview as PDF. Export anywhere
noCVsDescription: Create your first CV to get started
cannotDeleteAll: Cannot delete all CVs. Keep at least one.
charLimitExceeded: CV exceeds 2,500 character limit. Please shorten your content.
batchDeleteWarning: These CV{s} will be permanently deleted:
deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
ob1Text: Write your CV in Markdown, preview it as a formatted page, and download a polished PDF — all in your browser.
ob1L1: 100% offline — your data never leaves your device
ob1L4: Export to PDF or Markdown anytime
ob2Text: Use the Editor tab to write Markdown. Everything auto-saves as you type.
ob2L1: Copy button — copies your raw Markdown to clipboard
ob2L2: On mobile, switch between Editor and Preview with tabs or swipe
ob3Text: Switch to the Preview tab to see your formatted CV — exactly as the downloaded PDF.
ob3L1: Scale — controls font sizes in the PDF. Auto (recommended) fills the page evenly.
ob3L2: Zoom — preview display only, does not affect the PDF
ob3L3: Download PDF — generates a polished, ready-to-send document
ob4Text: Manage your CVs from the sidebar and personalize each one.
ob4L1: Sidebar — create, rename, duplicate, or delete CVs
ob4L3: Color picker — set a unique accent color per CV
ob4L5: Multi-select — batch download or delete from the sidebar
helpOverviewText: CV Stash is a browser-based Markdown CV editor. Write your resume in plain text with Markdown formatting, preview it as a professional document, and download it as a PDF.
helpOverviewL1: Everything runs locally — your data stays on your device
helpOverviewL2: Auto-saves to browser storage as you type
helpOverviewL4: Export to PDF or Markdown format
helpUISidebarDesc: Your CV list. Create, rename, duplicate, or delete CVs. Click a CV to edit it. Collapse the sidebar for more space.
helpUIEditorDesc: Write Markdown content. Auto-saves on every change. Use the Copy button to copy raw Markdown to clipboard.
helpUIPreviewDesc: See your formatted CV exactly as it will appear in the downloaded PDF.
helpUIScaleDesc: Controls actual font sizes in the PDF. Auto (recommended) scales text to fill the page height. Manual values lock a specific size.
helpUIZoomDesc: Adjusts the preview display size on screen. Does not affect the PDF output.
helpUIImportDesc: Load a .md or .txt file into the current CV.
helpUIExportDesc: Save the current CV content as a Markdown file.
helpUIDownloadDesc: Generate and download a PDF of your formatted CV.
helpUIColorDesc: Set the accent color used for headings, section borders, and bullet points.
helpTipsL1: Auto-scaling fills the page with your content. Use the Scale dropdown to override.
helpTipsL2: Zoom changes the preview display only. Scale changes actual font sizes in the PDF.
helpTipsL4: Each CV remembers its own accent color.
helpTipsL5: Multi-select — click the checkbox icon in the sidebar to batch-download or batch-delete CVs.
helpTipsL6: On mobile, swipe horizontally to switch between Editor and Preview tabs.
